MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:

Robert L. Smithton, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bay Area Properties, Ltd.
Ted Garey, Esq. appeared with defendant Eugene Mathot through limited scope representation.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502A for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment which was filed with the Clerk in Department 514.

This case settled, the trial date of May 16, 2011 is VACATED.
